sections.biography-internet-researched: Sun Qiang was Sun Jian’s elder twin brother. He is also the father of Sun Ben and Sun Fu. He was around at the start of Jain’s military career but died before the Yellow Scarves Rebellion. Though he died early it is said that he lived long enough to see his sons reach adulthood.

full_text:
Sun Qiang (Shengtai) 孫羌 (聖臺)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Qiang (孫羌), styledShengtai (聖臺), was born in Fu Chun County, Wu Prefecture (Presently Fu Yang, Zhe Jiang Province). The older brother of Sun Jian. Father of Sun Ben and Sun Fu. Sun Qiang was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Qiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Search Results
Sun Qiang… What Was He Like?
Date:04/2008Replies:10
BiographyInternet Researched
Sun Qiang was Sun Jian’s elder twin brother. He is also the father of Sun Ben and Sun Fu. He was around at the start of Jain’s military career but died before the Yellow Scarves Rebellion. Though he died early it is said that he lived long enough to see his sons reach adulthood.
